Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}It's about our track and field team. They don't have enough members, unfortunately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}The coach came crying to me about how they can't carry on like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Please! Do your teacher a favor, would you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I get the feeling she won't[n]let me leave unless I say yes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Okay then, don't forget to turn in your membership application after school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I ended up joining the[n]track and field team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I have no choice, so I'll[n]go to the field after school today.[n]{f 1 1}
